name: Strawberry Sundae Dessert
recipeIngredient: 1 8 1/2 oz package chocolate wafer cookies, finely crushed
1 can Eagle Brand Sweetened Condensed Milk
2 packages (10 oz each) frozen strawberries in syrup, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the crushed cookies and melted margarine. Press half of this mixture into a 9-inch square baking pan.
2. In a large bowl, mix the sweetened condensed milk and vanilla. Fold in the whipped cream. Pour this mixture over the pressed cookie layer in the pan.
3. In a blender or food processor, combine the remaining strawberries with lemon juice and cornstarch. Process until smooth.
4. To make the sauce, cook the strawberry mixture with cornstarch over medium heat until thickened. Allow it to cool before serving.
5. Chill the dessert. Cut into squares and serve with the sauce. Any leftovers can be frozen or refrigerated.
